title: Klypash
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Klypash''' was an island continent located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Trascor]]. One of the races of [[Shatras]], the [[Hy'tras]], was native to Klypash; during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] era, they could only be found in that specific region.

{{Nature-stub}}
